summary: Iteration 20 testing completed: All 21 backend API tests passed (100%), all frontend UI tests passed (100%). Features tested: batch user actions, pagination on Users page, dynamic page field config, RBAC sidebar filtering, server refactoring to routers, multipart file upload.

batch_user_actions.validation: Endpoint validates action type, requires admin role, excludes self from batch operations

features.individual_checkboxes: 9 checkboxes found for users (excluding current user)
features.batch_actions_bar: Appears when users selected - shows Activate/Deactivate/Delete buttons
features.pagination_controls: Prev/Next buttons visible with 'Showing X-Y of Z' text

login_role_permissions.description: Login response includes role_permissions dict in user object, aggregated from user's roles

file_upload_multipart.accepts: multipart/form-data with file, folder_id, project_id, category fields
file_upload_multipart.returns: File metadata with id, name, file_type, size, content_type

sidebar_navigation.rbac_filtering: Sidebar items filtered based on role_permissions from login response

page_settings_field_config.module_visibility_toggles: 12 module toggles found with enable/disable switches

seed_data_creation: None - test file created and deleted during file upload test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 20 features verified working: 1) Batch user actions (activate/deactivate/delete) via POST /api/users/batch-action, 2) Users page has pagination with 10/25/50/100 per page, checkboxes in rows, select all in header, batch actions bar when selected, 3) Dashboard/Reports/Notifications endpoints working after refactor to routers, 4) Login returns role_permissions for RBAC, 5) POST /api/files/upload accepts multipart form data, 6) Header Quick Add removed Lead/Project items, 7) Sidebar filtered by RBAC (no Projects link), 8) Settings > Page Settings has Module Visibility toggles AND field config for Bursary/Training/PDP pages with label editing, required toggle, visibility toggle.
